message:
feat(bundler): add bundle show, remove commands and registry tracking

- Add `ms bundle show` to inspect bundle contents (manifest, skills, signatures)
- Add `ms bundle remove` to uninstall bundles with optional skill removal
- Add --no-verify flag to install for skipping signature verification
- Implement BundleRegistry for tracking installed bundles with provenance
- Support install sources: GitHub, file, URL with metadata persistence

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
